title: Update podman-system-service.1.md
body:
"When I use 'podman system service -t 500 tcp://localhost:8080', I get an error 'Error: unable to create socket: listen tcp: lookup //localhost: no such host'. However, I noticed that I should use 'podman system service -t 500 tcp:localhost:8080'. Therefore, I suspect there is an error in the documentation here."

> What podman version are you using? This works correctly since v4.0 AFAICT ([8d3aec9](https://github.com/containers/podman/commit/8d3aec9d08bddf486dcb30e7113777b9d0cc27bd)) so I don't think this change is needed.
